user_story: As an HR admin, I want to add new travel request approvers, so that travel requests are routed to the correct approval authority.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Travel Request Approvers screen; When I click Add new travel request approvers and define the approver(s) and applicability; Then the approver configuration is saved and listed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to filter approvers by Location, Department and Position, so that I can quickly find the relevant approver configuration.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Travel Request Approvers screen; When I select Location, Department or Position and click Search; Then the list shows only matching approver records

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to reset the search filters, so that I can clear my selections and view all records.
acceptance_criteria: Given I have applied filters on the Travel Request Approvers screen; When I click Reset; Then the filters clear and the full list is shown

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view and edit an approver's applicability and hierarchy, so that the approval routing stays accurate.
acceptance_criteria: Given an approver record exists; When I click View or Edit; Then I can review or update the approver(s) and applicability details

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to configure approvers using the reporting manager hierarchy, so that travel requests escalate through the correct management levels.
acceptance_criteria: Given I am configuring travel request approvers; When I select a reporting manager hierarchy and applicability; Then requests are routed through that hierarchy
